allow: PowerShell(node scripts/fix-date-integrity.mjs > $env:TEMP\\date-fix-dryrun.txt 2>&1; "exit=$LASTEXITCODE"; Get-Content $env:TEMP\\date-fix-dryrun.txt | Measure-Object -Line | Select-Object -ExpandProperty Lines; Get-Content $env:TEMP\\date-fix-dryrun.txt -Tail 8)

PowerShell(git diff main...HEAD -- src/components src/app/globals.css "src/app/\(dashboard\)/summary/SummaryReportView.tsx" | Out-File $env:TEMP\\ui-diff.txt -Encoding utf8; \(Get-Content $env:TEMP\\ui-diff.txt | Measure-Object -Line\).Lines)
